data.summary: LangChain and LlamaIndex are two prominent frameworks for building LLM applications, particularly for implementing Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems. LangChain is widely recognized for its versatility, extensive community support, and suitability for rapid prototyping and experimentation. It offers a modular platform that supports a wide range of natural language processing and AI agent applications. On the other hand, LlamaIndex specializes in indexing, data ingestion, and informatio

Specific use cases where one framework significantly outperforms the other
Long-term maintenance and support prospects for each framework
